articles.title: THE BIG GUIDE TO AGENTS, LLMS, AND SMART APPS
articles.summary: The next evolution of AI-powered software isn’t chat bots, but apps that use LLMs to get actual work done. This ebook by the AI Infrastructure Alliance

articles.title: ADOBE BEEFS UP PHOTOSHOP WITH AI TOOLS
articles.summary: Adobe has released the official web version of Photoshop, equipped with AI tools powered by Firefly.

articles.title: MICROSOFT ANNOUNCES NEW AI TOOLS TO ASSIST DOCTORS
articles.summary: Microsoft introduced new AI tools in Microsoft Fabric and Azure AI to help healthcare organizations consolidate and interpret vast medical data.

articles.title: MINUTE READ) [https://archive.ph/X14An?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: The US warns the EU that its proposed AI regulations could favor well-resourced companies and hurt smaller ones. Washington's analysis criticizes the EU's focus on AI model development rather than the risk of model use, suggesting it could deter investment and AI R&D in the EU. The debate continues, aiming for alignment and shared AI objectives.

articles.title: LEVERAGE LLMS FOR ENHANCED VIDEO UNDERSTANDING
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced FAVOR, a new approach that allows large language models to understand videos by finely blending audio and visual details at the frame level.

articles.title: BOOSTING MATHEMATICAL REASONING OF LLMS
articles.summary: Researchers investigate the impact of data augmentation techniques on improving the math reasoning capabilities of large language models. They create a new dataset, AugGSM8K, by enhancing queries from an existing dataset and developing a model named MuggleMath.

articles.title: HUMAN TO ROBOT MOTION RETARGETING
articles.summary: Researchers have been able to transfer human motion onto robots by using a deep learning encoder. This is usually done with specialized hardware that has to be calibrated to the robot. Combining this with video-based motion capture could be a cool future project!

articles.title: IMPROVING VISUAL GENERATION WITH A NEW VIDEO TOKENIZATION [https://magvit.cs.cmu.edu/?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: This study introduces MAGVIT-v2, a video tokenizer that efficiently translates image and video inputs into tokens for Large Language Models. With MAGVIT-v2, LLMs surpass the performance of diffusion models in visual generation tasks.

articles.title: SPEEDING UP DIFFUSION MODELS FOR TEXT GENERATION
articles.summary: Researchers introduce a new technique for diffusion models used in text generation. By using a soft absorbing state, they improved how the model handled discrete text changes, resulting in faster learning and quicker sampling.

articles.title: TESTING LLMS IN THE COMPETITIVE WORLD OF AUCTIONS
articles.summary: Researchers have created AucArena, a simulation platform designed to test Large Language Models in auction settings, which are dynamic and require strategic thinking. Initial tests show that, with the right prompts, these models can perform impressively in auctions, showing skills like budgeting and long-term planning.

articles.title: AI HYPE IS BUILT ON FLAWED TEST SCORES
articles.summary: A growing number of researchers want to overhaul the way LLMs are assessed, calling for more rigorous and exhaustive evaluation, as they believe the practice of scoring machines on human tests is misguided.

articles.title: 8 WAYS SAAS COMPANIES CAN USE AI TO GET AHEAD
articles.summary: From task automation to writing code, AI is adding leverage to how we analyze customer data and build products. The key takeaway here is that AI is enabling people to do a lot more, and if you’re not using it, you’re likely going to get outpaced by your competition.

articles.title: AI BIAS TESTS GLOSS OVER A CRUCIAL ASPECT OF SKIN COLOR
articles.summary: Sony's AI research suggests a more "multidimensional" approach to measuring skin color, emphasizing not just lightness/darkness but also red and yellow hues. Current scales might overlook biases against certain ethnic groups. Sony recommends the CIELAB color standard, even as others tout the simplicity of systems like the Monk Skin Tone Scale. Google and Amazon are reviewing Sony's findings.

articles.title: FREE LIBRARY OF AI BUSINESS FRAMEWORKS
articles.summary: Scott Galloway’s education company, Section, has put together an incredible library of AI business frameworks you can use right now. Get your free AI business frameworks here.

Adobe unveiled a sneak preview of Project Stardust, an AI-powered photo editor, at its MAX conference. Using the Firefly Model 2, Stardust lets users effortlessly modify scenes, replace backgrounds, and remove objects.

articles.title: GITHUB COPILOT LOSES AN AVERAGE OF $20 PER USER PER MONTH
articles.summary: GitHub Copilot costs users $10 per month, but it is costing Microsoft an average of $20 per user per month. Some users are costing the company as much as $80 per month. This is likely why Microsoft decided to charge a lot more for the AI capabilities in Microsoft 365 Copilot. The costs are also likely why the company is developing its own in-house AI chip sets for its data centers and pushing the adoption of Neural Processing Units across the industry.
